tasks.name: Grouping chunks and summarizing them
tasks.description: Use chunk_text to group sentences into logical chunks, then use summarize_chunk to generate summaries for each chunk.

tasks.name: Merging the summaries
tasks.description: Use merge_summaries function on all generated summaries to create a single comprehensive summary.

tasks.name: Refining the summary
tasks.description: Use refine_summary function to polish and improve readability of the merged summary, ensuring it is fact-grounded.

tasks.name: Verification process
tasks.description: Use verify_claim function to check if the final summary aligns with the original text and contains all relevant facts.
tasks.expected_output: A confirmation that the summary is accurate

roadmap.notes: Ensure each step follows closely after previous steps to build a coherent roadmap.
